values.description: Scheduled trigger for customer loop synthetic canary
values.name: fjcloud-staging-customer-loop-canary

values.description: Runs the support email deliverability canary on a fixed schedule
values.name: fjcloud-staging-support-email-canary-schedule

values.alarm_description: ALB 5XX error rate above 1% over 5 minutes
ALB P99 target response time above 2s over 5 minutes
ALB reports one or more unhealthy targets for 3 consecutive minutes
API EC2 CPU utilization above 80% for 10 minutes
API heartbeat metric missing — process not running, lost CloudWatch egress, or IAM grant rolled back
API root volume disk usage above 85% for 10 minutes (CWAgent path=/, device=nvme0n1p1, fstype=xfs)
API EC2 status check failed — instance or system impairment
API webhook backlog has one or more stale unprocessed events for 10 minutes
AWS cumulative monthly charges crossed the configured threshold
Customer-loop canary Lambda reported one or more runtime errors in the last 15 minutes
Customer-loop canary Lambda was not invoked in the last hour — EventBridge schedule disabled, IAM/target wiring broken, or Lambda unavailable. The synthetic customer-journey probe is dark.
RDS active connections above 80% of max_connections=181 (threshold 145) for 10 minutes
RDS CPU utilization above 80% for 10 minutes
RDS free storage below 2 GiB
SES account-level bounce-rate reputation metric reached or exceeded 5%
SES account-level complaint-rate reputation metric reached or exceeded 0.1%
Support-email canary Lambda was not invoked in the last 12 hours — EventBridge schedule disabled, target wiring broken, or Lambda unavailable. The support-email deliverability probe is dark.

values.description: RDS: inbound 5432 from API SG only
values.name: fjcloud-staging-sg-rds

acm_certificate_arn.description: ACM certificate ARN used by the ALB HTTPS listener

cloudflare_zone_id.description: Cloudflare zone ID used by the public DNS module

customer_loop_canary_ecr_repository_url.description: ECR repository URL for customer loop canary image publication

customer_loop_canary_image_uri.description: Canonical image URI currently configured for customer loop canary Lambda

customer_loop_canary_lambda_function_arn.description: Lambda ARN for the customer loop canary runtime

customer_loop_canary_schedule_rule_name.description: EventBridge schedule rule name for customer loop canary runtime

private_subnet_ids.description: Private subnet IDs (for RDS and internal EC2)

ssh_key_pair_name.description: SSH key pair name for emergency access

ami_id.description: AMI ID for the API server (stock Amazon Linux 2023 ARM64 for MVP)

api_instance_type.description: EC2 instance type for the API server

instance_profile_name.description: IAM instance profile name for the API server

sg_api_id.description: Security group ID for the API server

database_url_ssm_arn.description: ARN of the SSM parameter storing the full DATABASE_URL

db_password_ssm_arn.description: ARN of the SSM parameter storing the DB password

private_subnet_ids.description: Private subnet IDs for RDS subnet group

sg_rds_id.description: RDS security group ID (from networking module)

acm_certificate_arn.description: ARN of the ACM certificate used by the HTTPS listener

alb_arn.description: ARN of the application load balancer

alb_arn_suffix.description: ARN suffix of the ALB (for CloudWatch metrics)

alb_dns_name.description: DNS name of the application load balancer

api_target_group_arn_suffix.description: ARN suffix of the API target group (for CloudWatch target-group metrics)

cloudflare_zone_id.description: Cloudflare zone ID used for public DNS records

ses_configuration_set_name.description: Canonical SES configuration-set name for bounce/complaint events

api_instance_id.description: EC2 instance ID for the API target

cloudflare_zone_id.description: Cloudflare zone ID for the public DNS zone

dns_ttl.description: TTL, in seconds, for Cloudflare-managed public DNS records

domain.description: Root domain name managed in Cloudflare

public_subnet_ids.description: Public subnet IDs for the internet-facing ALB

ses_feedback_topic_arn.description: SNS topic ARN used by SES configuration-set event destination

sg_alb_id.description: Security group ID for the ALB

vpc_id.description: VPC ID for ALB target group attachment

alb_5xx_error_rate_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for ALB 5XX error rate

alb_p99_target_response_time_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for ALB P99 target response time

alb_unhealthy_hosts_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for ALB unhealthy targets

api_cpu_high_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for API CPU over 80%

api_root_disk_high_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for API root-volume disk usage

api_status_check_failed_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for API EC2 status check failure

api_webhook_backlog_high_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for sustained API webhook backlog

cloudtrail_arn.description: CloudTrail ARN for audit-evidence ownership in monitoring

cloudtrail_export_bucket_arn.description: S3 bucket ARN used as CloudTrail export destination

cloudtrail_export_bucket_name.description: S3 bucket name used as CloudTrail export destination

cloudtrail_retention_days.description: CloudTrail export retention policy in days

customer_loop_canary_ecr_repository_url.description: ECR repository URL for the customer loop canary Lambda image

customer_loop_canary_image_uri.description: Canonical image URI used by the customer loop canary Lambda

customer_loop_canary_lambda_errors_alarm.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for customer-loop canary Lambda runtime errors

customer_loop_canary_lambda_function_arn.description: Lambda function ARN for the customer loop canary runtime

customer_loop_canary_not_running_alarm_a.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for customer-loop canary liveness (pages when the canary stops running)

customer_loop_canary_schedule_rule_name.description: EventBridge schedule rule name for the customer loop canary runtime

live_e2e_budget_action_enabled.description: Whether live E2E AWS Budgets action enforcement is operator-enabled

live_e2e_budget_configured.description: Whether a live E2E monthly spend ceiling is currently configured

live_e2e_budget_name.description: Canonical AWS Budgets budget name for live E2E spend guardrails

rds_connections_high_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for RDS connection pressure

rds_cpu_high_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for RDS CPU over 80%

rds_free_storage_low_alarm_arn.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for low RDS free storage

ses_feedback_sns_topic_arn.description: SNS topic ARN for SES bounce/complaint webhook delivery

sns_topic_arn.description: SNS topic ARN for infrastructure alerts

support_email_canary_ecr_repository_url.description: ECR repository URL for support-email canary image publication

support_email_canary_lambda_function_arn.description: Lambda function ARN for support-email canary

support_email_canary_lambda_function_nam.description: Lambda function name for support-email canary

support_email_canary_log_group_name.description: CloudWatch log group name for support-email canary Lambda

support_email_canary_not_running_alarm_a.description: CloudWatch alarm ARN for support-email canary liveness (pages when the canary stops running)

support_email_canary_schedule_arn.description: EventBridge schedule rule ARN for support-email canary

support_email_canary_schedule_name.description: EventBridge schedule rule name for support-email canary

description.constant_value: Scheduled trigger for customer loop synthetic canary
Runs the support email deliverability canary on a fixed schedule

alarm_description.constant_value: ALB 5XX error rate above 1% over 5 minutes
ALB P99 target response time above 2s over 5 minutes
ALB reports one or more unhealthy targets for 3 consecutive minutes
API EC2 CPU utilization above 80% for 10 minutes
API heartbeat metric missing — process not running, lost CloudWatch egress, or IAM grant rolled back
API root volume disk usage above 85% for 10 minutes (CWAgent path=/, device=nvme0n1p1, fstype=xfs)
API EC2 status check failed — instance or system impairment
API webhook backlog has one or more stale unprocessed events for 10 minutes
AWS cumulative monthly charges crossed the configured threshold
Customer-loop canary Lambda reported one or more runtime errors in the last 15 minutes
Customer-loop canary Lambda was not invoked in the last hour — EventBridge schedule disabled, IAM/target wiring broken, or Lambda unavailable. The synthetic customer-journey probe is dark.
RDS active connections above 80% of max_connections=181 (threshold 145) for 10 minutes
RDS CPU utilization above 80% for 10 minutes
SES account-level bounce-rate reputation metric reached or exceeded 5%
SES account-level complaint-rate reputation metric reached or exceeded 0.1%
Support-email canary Lambda was not invoked in the last 12 hours — EventBridge schedule disabled, target wiring broken, or Lambda unavailable. The support-email deliverability probe is dark.

alb_arn_suffix.description: Application Load Balancer arn_suffix for CloudWatch dimensions

alert_emails.description: Email addresses to subscribe to monitoring alerts

api_target_group_arn_suffix.description: API target-group arn_suffix for target-group scoped ALB CloudWatch dimensions

billing_alarm_threshold_usd.description: USD threshold for the AWS billing alarm (compared to AWS/Billing EstimatedCharges, which is CUMULATIVE for the current calendar month — set ABOVE expected monthly spend, not as a per-day rate).

canary_image.description: Canonical canary image publication input. The deploy workflow publishes this tag to the monitoring-owned ECR repository.

canary_live_mode.description: Enables Stripe-mutating live-money flow in the customer-loop canary runtime.

canary_schedule.description: Canonical canary schedule input. Enabled by default; suppress temporarily via the canary_quiet_until SSM parameter rather than disabling the EventBridge rule.

cloudtrail_export_bucket_name.description: Optional explicit S3 bucket name for CloudTrail exports; defaults to fjcloud-<env>-cloudtrail-export when empty

cloudtrail_name_override.description: Optional explicit CloudTrail trail name; defaults to fjcloud-<env>-guardrails when empty

cloudtrail_retention_days.description: Retention window in days for CloudTrail export objects in S3

domain.description: Root domain used to construct API webhook endpoints

live_e2e_budget_action_enabled.description: Enable AWS Budgets Actions auto-enforcement for live E2E resources. Defaults to disabled. For pre-launch fjcloud staging this is intentionally left disabled per the 2026-04-23 operator decision: alert-only notifications (see ops/scripts and docs/runbooks/staging-evidence.md) give the same signal without the risk of an auto-attached IAM policy locking staging out on breach. Enable only with a bounded-blast-radius role + policy pairing.

live_e2e_budget_action_execution_role_ar.description: IAM role ARN assumed by AWS Budgets to execute enforcement actions. Leave empty until operators provide canonical ownership.

live_e2e_budget_action_policy_arn.description: IAM policy ARN applied by AWS Budgets action enforcement. Leave empty until operators provide canonical policy ownership.

live_e2e_budget_action_principal_arn.description: IAM principal ARN that receives AWS Budgets action notifications/approvals. Leave empty until operators provide canonical ownership.

live_e2e_budget_action_role_name.description: IAM role name targeted by AWS Budgets action enforcement. Leave empty until operators provide canonical role ownership.

live_e2e_monthly_spend_limit_usd.description: Optional monthly spend ceiling in USD for live E2E budget enforcement. Leave null until operators provide the canonical value.

support_email_canary_discord_webhook_par.description: Optional explicit SSM parameter name for Discord webhook URL. Empty defaults to /fjcloud/<env>/discord_webhook_url.

support_email_canary_image_tag.description: Tag used with monitoring-owned ECR repository when support_email_canary_image_uri is not explicitly set.

support_email_canary_image_uri.description: Optional explicit image URI (or digest URI) for the support-email canary Lambda. When empty, monitoring composes URI from its ECR repository URL plus support_email_canary_image_tag.

support_email_canary_inbound_roundtrip_s.description: S3 URI passed to INBOUND_ROUNDTRIP_S3_URI for support-email canary runtime.

support_email_canary_recipient_domain_de.description: Default INBOUND_ROUNDTRIP_RECIPIENT_DOMAIN for support-email canary runtime.

support_email_canary_recipient_local_par.description: Optional fixed INBOUND_ROUNDTRIP_RECIPIENT_LOCALPART for support-email canary runtime. Leave empty to use script-generated nonce local parts.

support_email_canary_schedule_expression.description: EventBridge schedule expression for support-email canary runs.

support_email_canary_ses_from_address.description: SES sender identity used by support-email canary runtime as SES_FROM_ADDRESS.

support_email_canary_slack_webhook_param.description: Optional explicit SSM parameter name for Slack webhook URL. Empty defaults to /fjcloud/<env>/slack_webhook_url.

private_subnet_ids.description: Private subnet IDs (for RDS and internal EC2)

description.constant_value: API server: inbound from ALB on 3001, self-ref, outbound all
Flapjack VM: inbound 7700 from API SG, outbound all
RDS: inbound 5432 from API SG only

ami_id.description: Packer-built AMI ID for flapjack VMs

cloudflare_zone_id.description: Cloudflare zone ID for the public DNS zone

instance_profile_name.description: IAM instance profile name applied to runtime-provisioned flapjack VMs

key_pair_name.description: EC2 key pair name used for runtime-provisioned flapjack VMs

security_group_ids.description: Security group ID (single, comma-joined if multi) applied to flapjack VMs at runtime

ses_configuration_set_name.description: SES configuration set name consumed by application runtime

subnet_id.description: Public subnet ID used as the default runtime subnet

alert_emails.description: Email addresses to subscribe to operational monitoring alerts

ami_id.description: Packer-built AMI ID for flapjack VMs

api_instance_type.description: EC2 instance type for the API server (e.g. t4g.small for staging, t4g.medium for prod)

canary_image.description: Canonical canary image publication input forwarded to the monitoring module

canary_schedule.description: Canonical canary schedule input forwarded to the monitoring module. Enabled by default; suppress temporarily via the canary_quiet_until SSM parameter.

cloudflare_zone_id.description: Cloudflare zone ID for the public DNS zone

db_instance_class.description: RDS instance class (e.g. db.t4g.small for staging, db.t4g.medium for prod)

live_e2e_budget_action_enabled.description: Enable AWS Budgets action enforcement for live E2E resources

live_e2e_budget_action_execution_role_ar.description: IAM role ARN assumed by AWS Budgets to execute enforcement actions

live_e2e_budget_action_policy_arn.description: IAM policy ARN applied by AWS Budgets action enforcement

live_e2e_budget_action_principal_arn.description: IAM principal ARN used for AWS Budgets action ownership

live_e2e_budget_action_role_name.description: IAM role name targeted by AWS Budgets action enforcement

live_e2e_monthly_spend_limit_usd.description: Optional monthly spend ceiling in USD for live E2E budget enforcement

support_email_canary_discord_webhook_par.description: Optional explicit SSM parameter name for Discord webhook URL. Empty defaults to /fjcloud/<env>/discord_webhook_url.

support_email_canary_image_tag.description: Tag used with monitoring-owned ECR repository when support_email_canary_image_uri is not explicitly set.

support_email_canary_image_uri.description: Optional explicit image URI (or digest URI) for the support-email canary Lambda.

support_email_canary_inbound_roundtrip_s.description: S3 URI passed to INBOUND_ROUNDTRIP_S3_URI for support-email canary runtime.

support_email_canary_recipient_domain_de.description: Default INBOUND_ROUNDTRIP_RECIPIENT_DOMAIN for support-email canary runtime.

support_email_canary_recipient_local_par.description: Optional fixed INBOUND_ROUNDTRIP_RECIPIENT_LOCALPART for support-email canary runtime.

support_email_canary_schedule_expression.description: EventBridge schedule expression for support-email canary runs.

support_email_canary_ses_from_address.description: SES sender identity for support-email canary runtime.

support_email_canary_slack_webhook_param.description: Optional explicit SSM parameter name for Slack webhook URL. Empty defaults to /fjcloud/<env>/slack_webhook_url.
